import os
env = {}
for line in open\('.env'\).read\(\).splitlines\(\):
    line = line.strip\(\)
    if line and not line.startswith\('#'\) and '=' in line:
        k, _, v = line.partition\('='\)
        env[k.strip\(\)] = v.strip\(\)

keys = {
    'ELEVENLABS_API_KEY': env.get\('ELEVENLABS_API_KEY',''\),
    'FAL_KEY': env.get\('FAL_KEY',''\),
    'BUFFER_API_TOKEN': env.get\('BUFFER_API_TOKEN',''\),
    'TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN': env.get\('TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN',''\),
    'TELEGRAM_CHAT_ID': env.get\('TELEGRAM_CHAT_ID',''\),
    'YOUTUBE_API_KEY': env.get\('YOUTUBE_API_KEY',''\),
    'ANTHROPIC_API_KEY': env.get\('ANTHROPIC_API_KEY',''\),
    'CLOUDINARY_API_KEY': env.get\('CLOUDINARY_API_KEY',''\),
    'REPLICATE_API_TOKEN': env.get\('REPLICATE_API_TOKEN',''\),
}
for k, v in keys.items\(\):

# Audit cultural_radar and creative_synthesis
for fname, label in [
    \('scripts/agents/cultural_radar.py', 'cultural_radar'\),
    \('scripts/agents/creative_synthesis.py', 'creative_synthesis'\),
]:
    src = open\(fname\).read\(\)
    print\(f'--- {label} \({len\(src.splitlines\(\)\)} lines\) ---'\)
    print\(f'  anthropic API:    {"YES" if "anthropic" in src else "NO"}'\)
    print\(f'  claude model:     {"YES" if "claude" in src else "NO"}'\)
    print\(f'  requests.get/post:{"YES" if "requests" in src else "NO"}'\)
    import re
    urls = set\(re.findall\(r'https?://[a-zA-Z0-9._/\\-]+', src\)\)
    for u in sorted\(urls\): print\(f'  URL: {u}'\)
    output_files = re.findall\(r'"\(.*?\\.json\)"', src\)
    for f in output_files[:5]: print\(f'  output: {f}'\)
EOF)

Bash(cd ~/capital-engine && python3 - <<'EOF'
# Test Buffer GraphQL API \(distribute.py uses GraphQL, not REST\)
import requests, os
for line in open\('.env'\).read\(\).splitlines\(\):
    line=line.strip\(\)
    if line and '=' in line and not line.startswith\('#'\):
        k,_,v=line.partition\('='\)
        if v.strip\(\): os.environ[k.strip\(\)]=v.strip\(\)

token = os.environ.get\('BUFFER_API_TOKEN',''\)
GRAPHQL_URL = "https://api.buffer.com/graphql"

# Simple introspection query
query = '{ __typename }'
r = requests.post\(GRAPHQL_URL,
    headers={'Authorization': f'Bearer {token}', 'Content-Type': 'application/json'},
    json={'query': query}, timeout=15\)
print\(f'Buffer GraphQL: {r.status_code}'\)
print\(f'Response: {r.text[:300]}'\)
EOF)

import subprocess

    \('ffmpeg', ['-version']\),
    \('ffprobe', ['-version']\),
    \('exiftool', ['-ver']\),
]:
    try:
        r = subprocess.run\([cmd]+args, capture_output=True, text=True, timeout=10\)
        first_line = \(r.stdout + r.stderr\).splitlines\(\)[0]
        print\(f'  OK  {cmd}: {first_line[:60]}'\)
    except Exception as e:
        print\(f'  FAIL {cmd}: {e}'\)

# Font

    import caption_engine
    print\(f'  OK  caption_engine imported'\)
    print\(f'  OK  generate_ass: {callable\(getattr\(caption_engine,"generate_ass",None\)\)}'\)
    print\(f'  OK  run_ab_update: {callable\(getattr\(caption_engine,"run_ab_update",None\)\)}'\)
except Exception as e:

EOF)

Bash(cd ~/capital-engine && python3 - <<'EOF'
# Full integration smoke test — import chain from harbinger down
import sys, os
sys.path.insert\(0, 'scripts'\)
sys.path.insert\(0, 'scripts/agents'\)

for line in open\('.env'\).read\(\).splitlines\(\):
    line=line.strip\(\)
    if line and '=' in line and not line.startswith\('#'\):
        k,_,v=line.partition\('='\)
        if v.strip\(\): os.environ[k.strip\(\)]=v.strip\(\)

results = {}

mods = [
    \('prompt_engine',     'generate_all_prompts'\),
    \('caption_engine',    'generate_ass'\),
]
for mod, fn in mods:
    try:
        m = __import__\(mod\)
        results[mod] = callable\(getattr\(m, fn, None\)\)
        print\(f'  OK   {mod}.{fn}'\)
    except Exception as e:
        results[mod] = False
        print\(f'  FAIL {mod}: {e}'\)

# Test generate_all_prompts with real brief
import json, prompt_engine
brief = json.load\(open\('logs/creative_brief_20260308_153512_slot1.json'\)\)
result = prompt_engine.generate_all_prompts\(brief\)
print\(f'  OK   prompt_engine: {result["total_shots"]} shots, aesthetic={result["aesthetic_plan"]["primary"]}'\)

# Test caption_engine with sample brief
import caption_engine
ass, meta = caption_engine.generate_ass\(brief, {}\)
print\(f'  OK   caption_engine: {meta.get\("total_events",0\)} events generated'\)
EOF)

import os, fal_client
from pathlib import Path

for line in Path\('.env'\).read_text\(\).splitlines\(\):
    line = line.strip\(\)
    if '=' in line and not line.startswith\('#'\):
        k, _, v = line.partition\('='\)
        if k.strip\(\) and v.strip\(\):
            os.environ[k.strip\(\)] = v.strip\(\)

endpoints = [
    'fal-ai/kling-video',
    'fal-ai/kling-video/v1.6/pro/text-to-video',
    'fal-ai/kling-video/v1.5/pro/text-to-video',
    'fal-ai/kling-video/v1/standard/text-to-video',
    'fal-ai/kling-video/v2.1/master/text-to-video',
    'fal-ai/kling-video/v2/master/text-to-video',
]
for ep in endpoints:
    try:
        print\(f'Trying {ep}...', flush=True\)
        result = fal_client.run\(ep, arguments={
            'prompt': 'coin on dark desk cinematic',
            'negative_prompt': 'text watermark',
            'duration': '5',
            'aspect_ratio': '9:16',
        }\)
        print\(f'SUCCESS with {ep}'\)
        print\(result\)
        break
    except Exception as e:
        print\(f'  FAIL: {str\(e\)[:150]}', flush=True\)
" 2>&1)

# Harbinger Capital Engine — 5-slot cron schedule \(UTC\)
# Mac install:  crontab /Users/kolly/capital-engine/scripts/crontab.txt
# Linux install: crontab /root/capital-engine/scripts/crontab.txt
# All times UTC. UK BST=UTC+1 / GMT=UTC+0
# NOTE: edit HARBINGER path before installing on a new machine

SHELL=/bin/bash
PATH=/opt/homebrew/bin:/usr/local/bin:/usr/bin:/bin
HARBINGER=/root/capital-engine

# ── Daily intelligence \(once per day, before slot 1\) ─────────────────────────
30 5 * * * cd $HARBINGER && source .env && python3 scripts/agents/cultural_radar.py          >> logs/cron.log 2>&1
45 5 * * * cd $HARBINGER && source .env && python3 scripts/agents/algorithm_intelligence.py  >> logs/cron.log 2>&1

# ── Slot 1 — post at 07:00 UTC ───────────────────────────────────────────────
15 6  * * * cd $HARBINGER && source .env && python3 scripts/agents/creative_synthesis.py --slot 1 >> logs/cron.log 2>&1
0  7  * * * cd $HARBINGER && source .env && python3 scripts/harbinger_core.py --cycle 1           >> logs/cron.log 2>&1

# ── Slot 2 — post at 10:00 UTC ───────────────────────────────────────────────
15 9  * * * cd $HARBINGER && source .env && python3 scripts/agents/creative_synthesis.py --slot 2 >> logs/cron.log 2>&1
0  10 * * * cd $HARBINGER && source .env && python3 scripts/harbinger_core.py --cycle 2           >> logs/cron.log 2>&1

# ── Slot 3 — post at 13:00 UTC ───────────────────────────────────────────────
15 12 * * * cd $HARBINGER && source .env && python3 scripts/agents/creative_synthesis.py --slot 3 >> logs/cron.log 2>&1
0  13 * * * cd $HARBINGER && source .env && python3 scripts/harbinger_core.py --cycle 3           >> logs/cron.log 2>&1

# ── Slot 4 — post at 16:00 UTC ───────────────────────────────────────────────
15 15 * * * cd $HARBINGER && source .env && python3 scripts/agents/creative_synthesis.py --slot 4 >> logs/cron.log 2>&1
0  16 * * * cd $HARBINGER && source .env && python3 scripts/harbinger_core.py --cycle 4           >> logs/cron.log 2>&1

# ── Slot 5 — post at 19:00 UTC ───────────────────────────────────────────────
15 18 * * * cd $HARBINGER && source .env && python3 scripts/agents/creative_synthesis.py --slot 5 >> logs/cron.log 2>&1
0  19 * * * cd $HARBINGER && source .env && python3 scripts/harbinger_core.py --cycle 5           >> logs/cron.log 2>&1

# ── Nightly quality mirror \(full 7-loop run with YouTube analytics\) ───────────
30 22 * * * cd $HARBINGER && source .env && python3 scripts/agents/quality_mirror.py        >> logs/cron.log 2>&1

# ── Health check every 6 hours ───────────────────────────────────────────────
0 */6 * * * cd $HARBINGER && source .env && python3 scripts/harbinger_core.py --health      >> logs/health.log 2>&1
CRONEOF)

Bash(PATH="/opt/homebrew/bin:$PATH" python3 -c "
import ast, sys

files = [
    'scripts/harbinger_core.py',
    'scripts/agents/quality_mirror.py',
    'scripts/agents/production_agent.py',
]
for f in files:
    try:
        ast.parse\(open\(f\).read\(\)\)
        print\(f'  SYNTAX OK: {f}'\)
    except SyntaxError as e:
        print\(f'  SYNTAX ERROR: {f}: {e}'\)
        sys.exit\(1\)
")

Bash(source /Users/kolly/capital-engine/.env && curl -s -X GET "https://api.piapi.ai/api/v1/account/balance" \\
  -H "X-API-Key: $PIAPI_KEY" 2>&1 | python3 -m json.tool 2>/dev/null || \\
  curl -s "https://api.piapi.ai/mj/v2/accounts" -H "X-API-Key: $PIAPI_KEY" 2>&1)

Bash(source /Users/kolly/capital-engine/.env && \\
  curl -s -X POST "https://api.piapi.ai/api/v1/task" \\
    -H "X-API-Key: $PIAPI_KEY" \\
    -H "Content-Type: application/json" \\
    -d '{"model":"Qubico/flux1-dev","task_type":"txt2img","input":{"prompt":"test","width":1080,"height":1920}}' 2>&1 | python3 -m json.tool 2>/dev/null | head -30)

Bash(PATH="/opt/homebrew/bin:$PATH" python3 -c "
import ast, sys
files = [
    'scripts/agents/production_agent.py',
    'scripts/visual_router.py',
    'scripts/alert_manager.py',
    'scripts/email_monitor.py',
    'scripts/harbinger_core.py',
]
ok = True
for f in files:
    try:
        ast.parse\(open\(f\).read\(\)\)
        print\(f'  OK  {f}'\)
    except SyntaxError as e:
        print\(f'  ERR {f}: {e}'\)
        ok = False
sys.exit\(0 if ok else 1\)
")
